sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Siatna te'n ih nunna hong zo nuam in,
Ihkampau ah hong siah tawntung hi;
In khelh theih na'ngin, ih puk theih na'ngin,
Hong zol hong khem hong tah tawntung hi.
Hong bawlsia te ading thu ngetsak in;
Kizo sak peuhmah kei in la.
Thu hoih le thupha tawh zo tawntung in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na galte a gilkial leh an pia in,
A dang a taak leh zong tui suah in;
Siatnate siatna tawh thuk kik lo-in.
Thu hoih thupha tawh zo tawntung in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong sam hi eite thupha luah dingin,
Thuman sang thuhoih len tawntung in;
Anamtui pen leh a deihhuai penin,
Dikna puan bangin silh, tawntung in.
